results.title: 'I was bisexual before marriage': Akanksha Chamola breaks down after sexuality is revealed without her consent
results.description: Akanksha Chamola became emotional on Lock Upp 2 after her bisexuality was disclosed without her consent, prompting her to open up about her past relationships and the emotional impact of being outed on national television.

results.title: First look at new Oasis documentary about the Gallaghers’ reunion tour
results.description: Don’t Look Back In Anger follows Noel and Liam Gallagher as they undertake their Live ’25 tour, which kicked off a year ago in Cardiff

results.title: Clarkson’s Farm’s Kaleb Cooper announces he’s married long-term partner
results.description: The TV star and farming contractor shares three children with his partner Taya.
